title: ORDER BY ve LIMIT
subtitle: Siralama ve sonuc sayisini sinirlama.
code:
CREATE TABLE students (
    id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
    name TEXT NOT NULL,
    age INTEGER,
    grade REAL
);

INSERT INTO students (name, age, grade) VALUES
    ('Ahmet Yilmaz', 20, 85.50),
    ('Ayse Kaya', 21, 92.00),
    ('Mehmet Demir', 22, 67.25),
    ('Zeynep Sahin', 20, 78.75),
    ('Can Ozturk', 23, 55.00);

-- Nota gore artan siralama (varsayilan)
SELECT name, grade FROM students
ORDER BY grade ASC;

-- Nota gore azalan siralama
SELECT name, grade FROM students
ORDER BY grade DESC;

-- Birden fazla kolona gore siralama
SELECT name, age, grade FROM students
ORDER BY age ASC, grade DESC;

-- LIMIT ile ilk N kaydi getir
SELECT name, grade FROM students
ORDER BY grade DESC
LIMIT 3;

-- En yuksek notlu ogrenci
SELECT name, grade FROM students
ORDER BY grade DESC
LIMIT 1;

-- OFFSET ile sayfalama (3. ve 4. kayitlar)
SELECT name, grade FROM students
ORDER BY id
LIMIT 2 OFFSET 2;

-- DISTINCT ile tekrarsiz degerler
SELECT DISTINCT age FROM students;
